rawAssistant: A seeker of ancient wisdom, I see. The Moonwell is a sacred site where the rhythms of nature and the whispers of the past converge. In times of turmoil, it holds a mirror to the heart, revealing hidden truths about the creatures we've come to know as friends. Tonight's misty veil has lifted, allowing us to glimpse what lies beneath – perhaps the whispers of an old keepsake will guide you on your journey northward.
